name: SCM Database Handle Failure
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: SCM Database Handle Failure
SIGMA Description: Detects non-system users failing to get a handle of the SCM database.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4656 AND "Object Type"='SC_MANAGER OBJECT' AND "Object Name"='ServicesActive' AND "Access Mask"='0xf003f') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e4%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SCM Database Handle Failure on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4656 AND "Object Type"='SC_MANAGER OBJECT' AND "Object Name"='ServicesActive' AND "Access Mask"='0xf003f') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e4%')) AQL filter query
